result.stdout:
Description:
  Generates an HTML file from licenses.json.

Usage:
  hd-generate-licenses [options]

Options:
  -i, --input <input>    The input JSON file path.
  -o, --output <output>  The output HTML file path.
  --version              Show version information
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information
